'''"Arc of Fire" Bar & Grill''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] that was located on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Selenius VII]], within the [[Selenius system/Legends|Selenius system]].<ref name="Almost" /> At some point by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' is set before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Since "[[Almost Had 'Im]]" establishes that [[Renlo]] first entered [["Arc of Fire" Bar & Grill]] at least fifteen [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the conversation taking place in the narrative, the former event must have happened at some point by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[Renlo]] entered the bar, claiming that [[Gender/Legends|he]] would be the one to hunt down and capture the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. After making this claim, Renlo bought everyone present in the cantina [[Alcohol/Legends|drinks]], then left. After fifteen [[Standard month/Legends|months]], Renlo returned, having failed to capture Solo, and having lost much of his belongings. He worked as a [[Janitor/Legends|janitor]] in the bar afterwards, often muttering "Almost had 'im" repeatedly as he swept up [[Glass/Legends|glass]]. After Renlo began to work in the bar, an [[anonymous hunter]] who was a client of the cantina told Renlo's story.<ref name="Almost" />

==Behind the scenes==
The "Arc of Fire" Bar & Grill was created by [[Rick D. Stuart]], and introduced in the story ''[[Almost Had 'Im]]'' of ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', a [[1994]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Almost" />
